title: BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING - 211info
text: MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists clients in meeting the Bankruptcy Abuse Prevention and Consumer Protection Act of 2005 (BAPCPA) requirements for Pre-Bankruptcy Counseling and Pre-Discharge Debtor Education. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (866) 889-9347 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or see website. Services can be provided in person, by phone, or online. FEES: Vary by service (typically $20-$50) DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Bankruptcy Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING COUNSELING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL
